message:
feat(brenner-loop): create HypothesisCard React component

- Add HypothesisCard component with view and compact modes
- Implement ConfidenceBar with color-coded progress visualization
- Create DiscriminativeStructure collapsible section for predictions
- Add ConfoundsSection with addressed/unaddressed tracking
- Include action buttons: Edit, Evolve, View History
- Add HypothesisCardList wrapper with animations
- Export from components/brenner-loop/index.ts

Closes brenner_bot-an1n.3

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -0,0 +1,8 @@
+/**
+ * Brenner Loop Components
+ *
+ * UI components for the Brenner Loop research methodology system.
+ */
+
+export { HypothesisCard, HypothesisCardList } from "./HypothesisCard";
+export type { HypothesisCardProps, HypothesisCardMode } from "./HypothesisCard";
